deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd

Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo, family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) is dead — no earnest money received. Steve finished clearing the property Apr 29 and sent photos. New prospect reached out May 9 interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy: land-only cash deal, buyer does what they need after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect who wants to show the property. Post new photos to social media. Schedule drone footage for upgraded marketing.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use reached out wanting to show the property tomorrow.
Clearing complete. Steve finished and sent photos. First offer confirmed dead. Strategy confirmed: lead with net after close.
Current offer basically dead. Option money not received. Steve still clearing property.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. HouzzPro (Matt Toney, $54,877) selected over T&T (Kendall, $61,980). Matt Toney connected directly with Jerry Sadler at Priority Bank. Work officially starting — dumpsters dropping this weekend. Ray Stidham is bank decision-maker.
deals.next: Swing by property when in Devine to check on work progress. Check clubhouse for local contractor references. Follow up with Marc (plumber) on quote.

logs.m: Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney at his office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler at Priority Bank on a call.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry Sadler emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro.
Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still being explored.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession. Met Matt Van Gorder on-site for estimate.
Shot video and photos. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for contractor quotes.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Residential listing, underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Sellers double-carrying: apartment plus $2,843.85/month VA mortgage. Vacant 6 months, 208+ DOM. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction with cash to close.
deals.next: Talk to broker about short sale protocol first. Call Matt and Chandler to present three paths. Follow up with showing agent from May 5 showing for buyer feedback. Drop sign and lockbox when in Devine.

Buyer showing at 2pm by outside agent. Lawn care referral received from Garry Stephens: Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off given CMA. Showing scheduled Monday May 4 at 2pm.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths documented.
Gilberto buyers seem wishy-washy. Seller finance likely dead. Short sale situation possible.
Showing at property with potential owner finance buyer.
